stemHtml: An aircraft is in a steady right turn, with not enough right rudder (slipping turn). The yaw damper system:

options.a: acts on the left rudder pedal to provide a balanced turn.
options.b: is not designed to provide a balanced turn.
options.c: acts on the right rudder pedal to provide a balanced turn.
options.d: acts only in case of skidding turns (turn with not enough bank).
